author: phase-4-coordinator
content: Plan: Implement Serialize and Deserialize for Array<T, D> in ferray-core behind the existing serde feature flag. Serialize as {shape: Vec<usize>, data: Vec<T>}. Use to_vec_flat() for ser and from_vec(dim, data) for deser. Requires D: Dimension with from_slice or similar reconstruction. Will add serde impls for fixed-rank dimensions (Ix1-Ix6) and IxDyn.
